## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tested locally against a real Neon database
- [ ] New API routes tested with curl / Postman

## Schema changes?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes — `npm run db:push` required after merge

## Checklist

- [ ] Env vars documented in `.env.example` if new ones added
- [ ] Plan gate added if feature is Pro/Team only
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in code
